prompt:
TRANSPARENT background: alpha must be fully transparent everywhere except the drawn subject — no black fill, no white fill, no gray backdrop, no vignette panel behind the art. The canvas is see-through except for the illustration itself.

Artwork color: ONLY dark beige and deep tan linework — use a tight range like #3d2f24 through #5c4a38 and #6b5844 (warm brown-taupe). No pure white, no pure black ink, no cyan, no blue, no red accent. Fine art-directed strokes with subtle weight variation; parallel hatching and cross-hatching for volume (etched / scratchboard editorial feel — NOT flat uniform-stroke icons, NOT geometric schematics).

ABSOLUTELY FORBIDDEN: flowcharts, node-and-edge diagrams, connector arrows between boxes, equals signs, math symbols, circuit glyphs, isometric grid cubes, Figma-wireframe UI, pie charts, graphs, or anything that reads as engineering diagram.

COMPOSITION: one tangible still-life scene occupying roughly the LOWER ~55% of the frame; the UPPER ~45% should be completely transparent (empty). Light perspective OK. No text, letters, numbers, logos, watermarks, or labels.

Scene / metaphor: A brass or metal balance scale: two pans perfectly level, identical small weights or objects on each side — symmetry, same outcome every time. Metal engraved texture in dark beige linework only.
